skills.name: AI Safety Evaluation & Adversarial Testing
skills.description: Self-directed model-behavior testing across chat, image, agentic tool-use and indirect prompt-injection challenges, with conservative interpretation of platform-reported outcomes.

skills.name: Scientific Evidence Verification
skills.description: Primary-source fact-checking, bibliographic research, evidence screening, claim decomposition, source-quality assessment and cross-source corroboration.

skills.name: Structured Data Quality & Provenance
skills.description: Metadata structure, public-source reconciliation, taxonomy and validation workflows across Wikimedia, Wikidata, FAIRsharing, Zenodo and ENA records.

skills.name: Code-Literate Technical Operations
skills.description: Requirements definition, codebase reading and behavior inspection, functional testing, issue diagnosis, deployment operations and AI-assisted implementation workflows; not independent software development.
